description: Component connections map linking UI views, JS events, and Go controllers.

dns_core.purpose: Core DNS engine, Corefile updating, DoH internal proxies, query logging, and dashboard statistics.

mfa_security.purpose: Multi-Factor Authentication including local password verification, TOTP configurations, and WebAuthn security keys.

presets_rules.purpose: Client-specific presets lists, domain rules block/allow, high-risk country list toggles, and customized DNS filters.

system_diagnostics.purpose: System diagnostics, health checks, live terminal log streaming, backup and restore utilities, and upstream server verification.

geo_block.purpose: MaxMind GeoIP integration, local country lookup, and server-side country blocking controls.
